recommendations: Upgrade to integrated ERP/SCM systems with advanced analytics and dashboards
Establish inventory optimization with safety stock management and automated replenishment
Digitize procurement processes and establish supplier performance scorecards
Implement predictive analytics and supplier collaboration programs

consulting_package.description: Cross-functional integration, S&OP implementation, ERP/WMS guidance, ESG baseline
consulting_package.scope: Integrated planning, supplier scorecards, digital tools advisory, ESG framework
consulting_package.outcome: Move from functional silos to integrated, data-driven supply chain
